title: Curefit is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Curefit is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Curefit invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Curefit:
Curefit is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit!
